prompt: A clean character lineup sheet on a pure white background, showing 13 full-body stylized 3D characters in a whimsical stop-motion-inspired design with exaggerated proportions, textured fabrics, worn surfaces, muted earthy colors, and slightly creepy yet charming personality. Arrange them in 2 rows: 7 characters across the top row and 6 across the bottom row, each isolated with soft grounding shadows and plenty of white space, like a studio casting board for an animated film. Top row, left to right: 1) an extremely tall and painfully thin middle-aged man in a shabby brown suit, white shirt, narrow red tie, and checked trousers, with long fingers and slouched posture; 2) a short heavyset older woman with curly reddish hair, wearing a pink cardigan over a floral dress, sensible shoes, and carrying a brown handbag; 3) a very large burly man with tattooed forearms, wearing a red plaid flannel shirt, suspenders, dark worn pants, heavy boots, and a rough worker look; 4) a skinny teenage goth girl with pale skin, black messy ponytail, black jacket, dark shirt, skinny jeans, crossed arms, and a bored expression; 5) a lanky teenage boy in a knit beanie, layered hoodie and jacket, skinny jeans, and sneakers, hands in pockets; 6) a very tall elderly woman with an elegant beehive hairstyle, narrow face, tan blouse, scarf, long brown skirt, heels, handbag, and a cigarette held in one hand; 7) a slim teenage or young adult male with curly dark hair, wearing a striped sweater, narrow pants, and brown shoes. Bottom row, left to right: 8) a gaunt frail old person in ragged layered clothing and a stained apron, stooped forward with tired posture; 9) a thin middle-aged woman with hair in a high bun, mustard cardigan, long blue dress, flats, and a shoulder bag, holding something delicately in front of her chest; 10) a stocky police officer in a bulky navy winter uniform with fur collar, badge, utility belt, dark pants, and black shoes; 11) a chubby curly-haired boy wearing a varsity-style sleeveless jacket over a hoodie, knee-length shorts, socks, and sneakers, gripping his backpack straps; 12) a skeletal elderly man with a cap, huge nose, hunched spine, long coat, skinny trousers, and a cane; 13) a lanky mechanic or gas station worker in a dark blue jumpsuit and cap with the visible text GAS, holding a wrench. Keep the rendering highly detailed with felt, wool, denim, knit, leather, and dust-like material realism, but maintain caricatured anatomy and expressive silhouettes. Use a subdued palette of browns, rust reds, dusty pinks, charcoal, navy, beige, and faded denim. The overall mood should feel like quirky residents of a rundown small town from a darkly comic animated feature, presented as a polished ensemble cast sheet.
